RuleSet.Name: src/Schema/SchemaTableHBuff.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 11 implementation of a $TableName$ history buffer object.
RuleSet.GenRule: $reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable implHBuffCompareHierarchy$$iterate DataColumns( each implCompareToAttr empty empty )$
$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implBuffSetCopyPKeyCol )$
super.set$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$Buff( src );
